title: Duke Kunshan University SGC article
summary: Comprehensive institutional article documenting Startup Go Camp's structure, methodology, and outcomes.

highlights.label: Identification
highlights.title: Three organizational roles confirmed
highlights.text: Article identifies Kehan Dong as 'angel investor, founder of Inner Journey, and founder of the NGO Code of Love.'

highlights.label: Student satisfaction
highlights.title: 90.4/100 course rating
highlights.text: Students rated the course as high as 90.4 points and expressed their love for the course many times.

highlights.label: Teaching methodology
highlights.title: Office Hours approach
highlights.text: 4-hour weekly Office Hours for high-quality interaction, creating space for students to share ideas without fear of judgment.

title: kehandong.com personal profile

highlights.label: Core philosophy
highlights.title: Early building and unconventional paths
highlights.text: 'I work with people who start building earlier than they're supposed to. Early founders, unconventional paths, long-term agency.'
